description: Add a complete Retrofit networking layer to the PostViewer Android project. The implementation includes dependencies for Retrofit (com.squareup.retrofit2:retrofit:2.9.0), Moshi Converter (com.squareup.retrofit2:converter-moshi:2.9.0), Moshi Kotlin (com.squareup.moshi:moshi-kotlin:1.15.0), OkHttp Logging Interceptor (com.squareup.okhttp3:logging-interceptor:4.12.0), and Kotlin Coroutines Android (org.jetbrains.kotlinx:kotlinx-coroutines-android:1.7.3) in app/build.gradle.kts. The project requires the INTERNET permission in app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml. Create a Post data model in app/src/main/java/com/example/postviewer/model/Post.kt with fields for id, userId, title, and body, annotated with @JsonClass(generateAdapter = true). Implement a PostApiService interface in app/src/main/java/com/example/postviewer/network/PostApiService.kt with suspend functions getPosts() (@GET("posts")), getPost(@Path("id") id: Int) (@GET("posts/{id}")), and getPostsByUser(@Query("userId") userId: Int) (@GET("posts")). Provide a singleton ApiClient in app/src/main/java/com/example/postviewer/network/ApiClient.kt configured with the base URL https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/ and a BODY level HttpLoggingInterceptor, exposing the PostApiService. The project must build successfully.
